ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification

ingredients_text: Houmous 70% (Chickpeas, Rapeseed Oil, Tahini Sesame Seed Paste, Water, Salt, Acidity Regulators (Citric Acid, Lactic Acid), Garlic Powder, Sugar, Cumin, Preservative (Potassium Sorbate)), Breadstick 30% (Wheat Flour, Water, Olive Oil, Sea Salt, Yeast)
